explanations.6: The @app.get decorator tells FastAPI that this function should respond to GET requests at the root URL path.
explanations.11: Union[str, None] means the parameter q can be either a string or None (nothing), and it defaults to None if not provided in the request.
explanations.14: This route path /items/ is different from line 10's /items/{item_id} because it has no variable placeholder, so it only matches the exact path without any item ID.
